variants.name: 禁咒
variants.ability: 如果一名玩家提交以下任何咒语，他死亡。（1）改变阵营。（2）更改角色能力或使角色能力失效（醉酒和中毒除外）。（3）复活。
variants.firstNightReminder: Kill any player that submitted a forbidden spell, unless their ability allows it.
variants.otherNightReminder: Kill any player that submitted a forbidden spell, unless their ability allows it.
